config_contents:
diagnostics:
  field_dump_interval: 500
  mode: analysis
  particle_dump_interval: 5000
dt_multiplier: 0.95
keep_checkpoints: false
nozzle:
  coils:
  - I: 40000.0
    r: 0.1
    z: 0.0
  domain:
    r_max: 0.6
    z_max: 2.0
    z_min: -0.3
  resolution:
    nr: 128
    nz: 256
  type: solenoid
output_dir: results/validation/free_expansion
plasma:
  T_e_eV: 100.0
  T_i_eV: 100.0
  electron_model: kinetic
  mass_ratio: null
  n0: 1.0e+18
  neutrals: null
  species:
  - H+
  - e-
  v_injection_ms: 50000.0
random_seed: null
timesteps: 20000
hardware:
Platform: darwin (arm64)
CPU cores: 12
Apple Silicon: Apple M4 Pro
Recommended backend: omp
OMP threads: 12

validation_proximity.warning: Config is far from all validated cases (nearest: 'free_expansion', distance=3.03). Consider adjusting: B_T (currently 3.0x outside the validated half-width; nearest validated centre is 0.1).
